message:
feat: implement client-side split panes with resize support

Add SplitContainer class to manage split pane layouts within tabs:
- Support horizontal and vertical splits (right/down/left/up)
- Draggable dividers for resizing splits
- Keyboard shortcuts: ⌘D (split right), ⌘⇧D (split down)
- Navigate splits: ⌘⌥Arrow or ⌘]/⌘[ to cycle
- Each split pane has its own terminal panel with WebSocket
- Close individual splits or entire tabs

Refactored App class to use tab-based architecture:
- Tabs contain SplitContainer trees instead of single panels
- Proper focus tracking across split panes
- Updated menu actions and keyboard shortcuts
